authors: Landauer, R.

authors: Landauer, R.

authors: Bérut, A.; Arakelyan, A.; Petrosyan, A.; Ciliberto, S.; Dillenschneider, R.; Lutz, E.

column8: <Q_diss>) points from a colloidal double-well erasure experiment.

authors: Bérut, A.; Petrosyan, A.; Ciliberto, S.

authors: Proesmans, K.; Ehrich, J.; Bechhoefer, J.

authors: Proesmans, K.; Ehrich, J.; Bechhoefer, J.

authors: Sagawa, T.; Ueda, M.
